problem id: 5570b0a1
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(1) AND NOT SHR(5)) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  11101010 -> 01101111
  11001011 -> 00001110
  11001010 -> 00101110
  00100011 -> 11011001
  10000111 -> 00010100
  10000010 -> 10111110
  00011011 -> 10101001
  11000111 -> 10010110

query: 10100001
predicted answer: 10011101
